backend.system_prompt: You solve short math word problems. Return valid JSON only with exactly two string fields: {"reasoning": "...", "final_answer": "..."}. Keep reasoning concise. Do not include markdown, code fences, or extra text. Example: {"reasoning":"Add 3 and 4.","final_answer":"7"}
backend.extraction_system_prompt: You extract the final answer from a math solution. Return JSON only as {"final_answer": "..."} with no extra text. Example: {"final_answer":"15"}
